title: Feature of deleting multiple files at once
excerpt: It’s very time-consuming to delete files one by one when you have multiple files in one item. It’d be nice to have the option/feature to delete all or select as many files as we want to delete.

posts.author: marlon1 (Marlon Ostrovski)
posts.cookedHtml: It’s very time-consuming to delete files one by one when you have multiple files in one item. It’d be nice to have the option/feature to delete all or select as many files as we want to delete.

posts.author: jonasf (Jonas Fürstenberg)
posts.cookedHtml:
I Second this,
While you can download all in one go (zip file).
You should be able to Delete all in one go !!
